data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Guest:
Hm, so they doubled the guests by
using POKéMON as attractions?\pHm, well, maybe I should make a cute
POKéMON our inn's mascot.\pI wonder if that will attract more
guests to stay with us?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_NoGue: Oh, sorry, sorry!\nI was too involved in watching TV!\pSince that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} came to town,\nthe tourists have been staying away.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_CantS: Hey, down in front!\nI can't see the TV!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_MonFo:
Amazing! You're telling me a POKéMON
found someone's lost item?\pThat's something. If we had some smart
POKéMON like that...\pWe could recover anything that our
guests mislaid...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Heard:
Oh, sorry, sorry!
I was too involved in watching TV!\pI heard that someone busted the
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} HIDEOUT.\pThanks to that, we just booked a
reservation from a big group.\pIt was a company called... Uh...
GAME something...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_House:
Amazing! A house-sitting POKéMON
caught a burglar?\pThat's something. If we had a tough
POKéMON as a security guard...\pWe would be able to provide our guests
with greater safety.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Bette:
Oh, sorry, sorry!
I was too involved in watching TV.\pOh, yes. A big group of guests arrived
a little while ago.\pThey booked in as GAME FREAK, so I
guess they must make games.\pUh-oh, I'd better get working on
their dinner!
